bead.title: work plan: --explain and --json flags
bead.description:
PROBLEM
ddx work plan today shows one-line aggregate skip messages ("skipped 10 ready epic(s) with open children..."). Operators cannot see which specific reason code the diagnoser assigned to each bead, and there is no machine-readable output for chaining.

ROOT CAUSE
cli/cmd/work_plan.go (runWorkPlan or equivalent) does not call cli/internal/bead/diagnose.go and does not expose --explain/--json.

PROPOSED FIX
Extend cli/cmd/work_plan.go:
- Add --explain flag. When set, for every entry in breakdown.Epics, breakdown.DepWaiting, breakdown.OperatorAttention, print a per-bead line under the existing aggregate header: "  <bead-id>  <reason-code>  <detail>  <cited-ids if any>". Keep existing one-line aggregate (or replace it with a count) for backward compatibility.
- Add --json flag. Emit a structured object: { ready: [...], blocked_by_reason: { <reason_code>: [{id, title, detail, cited_ids}] }, summary: { total_open, ready, ... } }. Suitable for piping into jq.

Both flags are read-only. They share the diagnoser path with ddx work focus and ddx work (the actual loop); rendering differs.

NON-SCOPE
- Changing the default output format (the existing aggregate stays unless --explain is set).
- Auto-action / mutation (this is read-only).

PARENT AND DEPS
Parent: ddx-2a1ece2b. Depends on ddx-79e66725 (diagnose function).
bead.acceptance:
1. ddx work plan --explain prints per-bead reason codes from the FEAT-010 taxonomy under each non-ready entry, including cited blocker IDs for dep_blocked_by.
2. ddx work plan --json emits the documented schema, parseable by jq.
3. TestWorkPlan_ExplainPrintsPerBeadReason: fixture seeds beads matching each reason code; output contains every code at least once.
4. TestWorkPlan_JSONStructure: --json output validates against the documented schema; ready, blocked_by_reason, and summary fields all populated.
5. TestWorkPlan_BackwardCompatDefault: without flags, output matches today's behavior (existing test should not need changes beyond accepting an optional trailing summary line if added).
6. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run TestWorkPlan -count=1 green.
7. cd cli && go test ./... green.
8. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
